grading_notes: Scope: cage_gas_termination_thread pack only. Total from Eric Moon's per-deal breakdown (N47413 + N10445 + NB0242). Do not accept the separate L/C draw figure of $540,170.00 from an earlier Cage Update email. Dollar aliases accepted per NORMALIZATION.md; commas and leading $ optional. Both evidence Message-IDs required: Debbie requests the per-transaction breakdown (6.) and Eric Moon provides the deal-level total (7.). Use file 7., not the near-duplicate forward in 8.

Scope: cage_gas_termination_thread pack only. Filing date from the Dun & Bradstreet bankruptcy alert body (FILING DATE: 10/03/00), not the alert receipt date. Date-only answer; Pacific offset context per NORMALIZATION.md. Both evidence Message-IDs required: escalation context before bankruptcy (11.) and the bankruptcy notification (12.).

grading_notes: Scope: pge_hydro_auction_thread pack only. The two May 2000 finale emails ordered by Date header: Revised Memo (2000-05-16) then Talking Points for Hydro Presentation (2000-05-17). Ignore the unrelated 1999 auction sub-thread. Subject lines must match exactly; semicolon separator with optional single space after semicolon. Both evidence Message-IDs required.

Scope: cage_gas_cross_mailbox pack only. Cross-mailbox corroboration requires hyvl-d escalation (Lisa Mellencamp asks whether Dan Hyvl talked to Richard Sanders) AND sanders-r sent-mail follow-up from Richard Sanders himself. Do not accept the duplicate all_documents/469. copy (different Message-ID). Both listed evidence Message-IDs required.

Final event is Materials Provided to California Governor (2001-01-03). Same-day 2000-12-22 messages tie-break by time-of-day; earliest is file 2. not file 1. Date-only answers; semicolon separator with optional space. Both evidence Message-IDs required.

Scope: pge_bankruptcy_timeline pack only. Both the Chapter 11 filing news forward and Enron's Response Statement to PG&E's Ch. 11 Filing are dated 2001-04-06 (order within the day: filing news ~04:47, response statement ~06:17). Date-only answer per NORMALIZATION.md. Both evidence Message-IDs required.

Scope: pge_bankruptcy_timeline pack only. Chronological sequence: PG&E Chapter 11 filing news (2001-04-06), FW: PGE Bankruptcy motions (2001-04-09), PX credits & Schedule F (2001-05-23). Use top-level Date headers, not quoted forward dates inside bodies. All three evidence Message-IDs required; order in the answer must match chronological order.

Scope: tva_settlement_contradiction pack only. The 2000-11-28 REVISED draft (subject REVISED TVA Settlement Agreement) explicitly says DISREGARD THE EARLIER DRAFT in its body, resolving the conflict with the earlier July 2000 Draft Proposal letter to TVA. Subject must match the top-level Subject header exactly. Both evidence Message-IDs required: the authoritative REVISED draft (tva/1.) and the superseded earlier draft (tva/5.).
